arts.ttl: The Raphinha Transfer Saga: How Leeds Unearthed a Star
arts.sum: Raphinha was the final signing made by the Whites in the 2020 summer transfer window, bringing in the Brazilian right-winger from Rennes on deadline day – a pushed-back window due to the previous delayed season, meaning he actually joined in early October. From a relatively unheralded signing by Leeds United, of a player few had really knew a great deal about, to a sought-after star in European football, Raphinha’s journey is a testament to shrewd recruitment, and a perfect example of how a player can leave a lasting mark despite only being here for two seasons.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Farke shares Aaronson, Gnonto update
arts.sum: Leeds United travel to Luton Town this Saturday knowing that they’re going to have at least one change to their starting lineup, but the outfield could do with a review after the Swansea performance too. Brenden Aaronson may have scored after around half a minute, but his overall display left a lot to be desired, along with the two wingers continuing to look lethargic in and out of possession, leaving Joel Piroe goalless in five – while Willy Gnonto’s stock in pushing for a start rose further with a goal despite just having four touches off the bench.

arts.ttl: Premier League promotion sees Luton Town announce record turnover and profits
Meslier dropped, Farke defiant - but will it stop Leeds falling apart... again?
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke was honest in his admission that the timing was right to take Illan Meslier out of the side.

arts.ttl: Leeds United: Meslier may have played last game at ER
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has confirmed that goalkeeper Karl Darlow will replace Illan Meslier this weekend for the trip to Luton Town. Illan Meslier axed for Luton Town trip – Karl Darlow to start

arts.ttl: Leeds United see huge Bristol City fixture rescheduled as Championship run-in confirmed
arts.sum: Leeds United's final home match of the season against Bristol City has been moved after being selected for Sky Sports coverage. The Whites currently trail leaders Sheffield United by two points after a mini wobble but manager Daniel Farke remains convinced his side will gain promotion.

arts.ttl: Darlow to replace Meslier as Leeds keeper at Luton
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke confirms he will start Karl Darlow, not Illan Meslier, in goal for Saturday's Championship trip to Luton.

arts.ttl: Meslier dropped for Leeds' next game after Swansea blunder
arts.sum: Illan Meslier has been dropped for Leeds' trip to Luton on Saturday after his high-profile errors against Swansea.

arts.ttl: Farke confirms Meslier dropped for Leeds' next game
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has confirmed goalkeeper Illan Meslier will not start in goal for Leeds for their trip to Luton on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Leeds United news: Farke to axe Meslier v Luton
arts.sum: Daniel Farke confirms Illan Meslier axe for Luton Town – Karl Darlow to start Daniel Farke’s big selection headache this weekend was going to be who starts in goal after Illan Meslier’s latest howler as Leeds United’s number one.
